overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit footage from a video game, flying over water toward the Statue of Liberty landmark, circling it closely, then proceeding toward a foggy urban skyline. The instrument panel remains visible throughout the overcast flight.

agents.ego_description: piloting the helicopter straight toward the Statue of Liberty landmark visible in the distance

entered.detail: large green copper statue on a stone pedestal, visible ahead through the haze
small forested island supporting the statue
distant foggy silhouette of skyscrapers on the horizon
flight instrument panel with gauges and GPS display visible at bottom of frame

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies steadily over gray water toward the Statue of Liberty, which grows from a distant silhouette to a prominent landmark. The foggy city skyline is visible far in the background while the instrument panel remains fixed in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: close proximity flight around statue landmark

events.description: helicopter banks left to pass closely by the statue

agents.ego_description: banking the helicopter left to circle closely around the statue, passing it on the right side

segments.scene_description: The helicopter executes a left bank to pass extremely close to the Statue of Liberty, which fills the left side of the frame before passing behind the aircraft. The view transitions from facing the statue to facing the open water and distant city.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor flight toward urban skyline

events.description: passed the statue, now facing the distant city skyline across the water

agents.ego_description: flying steadily toward the foggy city skyline with the statue now behind

segments.scene_description: With the statue now behind, the helicopter continues over open water toward the city skyline, which gradually becomes more defined through the haze. The water surface stretches to the horizon with no other landmarks visible.

events.description: helicopter descends slightly as it approaches the city buildings

agents.ego_description: descending toward the city while maintaining forward speed as buildings grow larger

entered.detail: individual tall buildings with glass facades becoming distinguishable from the skyline

segments.scene_description: The helicopter approaches the city skyline, which resolves into distinct skyscrapers and downtown buildings. The aircraft descends slightly as it nears the urban area, with individual building details becoming visible through the overcast haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight over gray waters that begins with a distant landmark and concludes with an approach into a dense urban skyline. It begins with the helicopter flying steadily toward the Statue of Liberty, which grows from a silhouette into a prominent figure against a foggy background while the instrument panel remains fixed in the foreground. As the aircraft executes a sharp left bank, the statue fills the frame and then recedes behind the helicopter, shifting the view toward the open water and the distant city. The scene then expands across the horizon as the helicopter proceeds through the haze, causing the distant skyline to gradually become more defined. Finally, the aircraft descends slightly as it nears the city, where the overcast mist clears enough to resolve the skyline into distinct skyscrapers and detailed downtown buildings.
